member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Login(GzsBilling.Domain.Models.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Login and get JWT token with role-based permissions

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.AuthController.GetCurrentUser
member.summary: Get current user info from token

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.AuthController.GetTestAccounts
member.summary: Get available test accounts (dev only)

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.PayController.GetColumnInfo(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get column info for payment page

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.PayController.ProcessPayment(System.Guid,GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.PayRequest)
member.summary: Process payment for a column (simulated)

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.PaymentsController.CreatePayment(GzsBilling.Api.Models.CreatePaymentRequest)
member.summary: Create a new payment transaction

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetTransaction(System.String)
member.summary: Get transaction by ID

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetTransactions(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all transactions with optional filters

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetDashboard
member.summary: Get daily transaction statistics

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.PaymentsController.Health
member.summary: Health check - no auth required

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.QrController.GetQrCode(System.Guid)
member.summary: Generate QR code image for a column ID. QR contains the full payment URL: {scheme}://{host}/pay/{columnId} The host is derived dynamically from the incoming request so the QR works regardless of whether the API is accessed via localhost or ngrok.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.QrController.GenerateQrCodes(System.Collections.Generic.List{GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.QrGenerateRequest})
member.summary: Generate QR codes from JSON array. Each item must have "url" field. Optional "label" for identification. Returns array of base64 PNG QR codes.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TestImitationController.CreateTestTransaction(GzsBilling.Api.Models.TestImitationRequest)
member.summary: Test endpoint: create a simulated transaction for testing purposes. No authentication required. No real payment processing happens.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.UgazController.GetInfo(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get payment info from UGaz and create a pending transaction

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.UgazController.Process(GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.UgazProcessRequest)
member.summary: Process payment: pay or cancel using real UGaz API fields. Extracts action from payment_status if action is not provided: "finished" → pay, "cancel_transaction" → cancel, "new" → pay

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.DisputesController.CreateDispute(GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.CreateDisputeRequest)
member.summary: Create a new dispute for a transaction. Sets status to Open and SLA deadline to 30 calendar days from creation.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.DisputesController.GetDispute(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve a dispute by ID, including its full history and evidence list.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.DisputesController.UpdateDisputeStatus(System.String,GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UpdateDisputeStatusRequest)
member.summary: Update the status of a dispute. Allowed transitions: Open to UnderReview, UnderReview to Resolved/Rejected, Rejected to UnderReview.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.DisputesController.GetDisputes(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List disputes with optional filters for status, contragent, and date range.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.DisputesController.UploadEvidence(System.String,GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UploadEvidenceRequest)
member.summary: Upload evidence documents for a dispute. Accepts metadata about evidence files (actual file upload would use multipart).

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.ReconciliationController
member.summary: Manages reconciliation operations between internal billing records and external provider statements.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.ReconciliationController.RunReconciliation(System.String)
member.summary: Trigger a manual reconciliation run for the specified provider.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.ReconciliationController.GetReports(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List reconciliation reports with optional provider filter.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.ReconciliationController.GetStats
member.summary: Get reconciliation statistics.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.RefundsController.CreateRefund(GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.CreateRefundRequest)
member.summary: Create a refund for a completed transaction. Protected against double refund: returns 409 if refund already exists.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.RefundsController.GetRefund(System.String)
member.summary: Get refund by ID with full audit chain

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.RefundsController.GetRefunds(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all refunds with optional filters

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.ShareholdersController.GetAll
member.summary: List all shareholders (Admin only)

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.ShareholdersController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get shareholder by ID

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.ShareholdersController.Create(GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.CreateShareholderRequest)
member.summary: Create a new shareholder (Admin only)

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.ShareholdersController.Update(System.Guid,GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UpdateShareholderRequest)
member.summary: Update an existing shareholder (Admin only)

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.ShareholdersController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a shareholder (Admin only)

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.StationsController.GetAll
member.summary: List all gas stations

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.StationsController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get station by ID with columns

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.StationsController.GetColumns(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get all columns for a station

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.StationsController.Create(GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.CreateStationRequest)
member.summary: Create a new gas station (Admin only)

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.StationsController.Update(System.Guid,GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UpdateStationRequest)
member.summary: Update an existing gas station

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.StationsController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a gas station (Admin only)

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.StationsController.AddColumn(System.Guid,GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.CreateColumnRequest)
member.summary: Add a column to a station

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.StationsController.UpdateColumn(System.Guid,System.Guid,GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UpdateColumnRequest)
member.summary: Update a column

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.StationsController.DeleteColumn(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a column

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UsersController.GetAll
member.summary: List all users (Admin only)

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UsersController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get user by ID

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UsersController.Create(GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.CreateUserRequest)
member.summary: Create a new user. Manager+ can create Operators/ReadOnly. Admin creates all roles.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UsersController.Update(System.Guid,GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UpdateUserRequest)
member.summary: Update an existing user

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.v1.UsersController.Deactivate(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deactivate a user (soft delete)

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.WebhooksController.PaymentStatusCallback(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Receive payment status callback from external payment systems

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.WebhooksController.ReconciliationCallback(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Receive reconciliation callback

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Middleware.Security.IdempotencyMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that enforces idempotent request processing using the X-Idempotency-Key header. Caches the original response for 24 hours and replays it on duplicate keys.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Middleware.Security.IdempotencyMiddleware.DeriveCacheKey(System.String)
member.summary: Derives a deterministic, compact cache key from the idempotency key. Uses SHA-256 and takes the first 16 hex characters, prefixed with "idem:".

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Middleware.Security.IdempotencyMiddleware.CachedResponse
member.summary: Serializable representation of a cached HTTP response.

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Models.TestImitationRequest
member.summary: Request payload for the test transaction imitation endpoint.

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Models.TestTransactionResponse
member.summary: Response returned after a test transaction is successfully created.
